integrations.notion: Update and validate documentation against code changes, sync review statuses, and convert comments into actionable tasks to keep docs and code perfectly aligned.
integrations.googledocs: Auto‑generate or update a Google Doc with PR summaries, push review comments as inline document comments, and keep tables and charts in sync with code changes.
integrations.jira: Create and manage issues: add comments and watchers, bulk‑create and assign tickets, link issues and sprints, run JQL searches, and transition statuses—keeping tickets and code perfectly in sync.
integrations.sentry: Access project and team info, retrieve and update issues and events, and create releases—bringing error tracking and release management into your code reviews.
integrations.linear: Create and manage Linear issues: create, update, and label tasks, add comments, fetch cycles, projects, and states, and run queries—keeping code reviews and your roadmap perfectly in sync.
integrations.gmail: Send, receive, and manage emails with advanced filtering, attachment handling, and automated email workflows.
integrations.github: Manage repositories, issues, pull requests, and releases with comprehensive GitHub integration for seamless development workflow.
integrations.slack: Read-only Slack: search messages across the workspace, list channels/users, and fetch conversation history and replies.
integrations.trello: Create cards, manage boards, and organize projects with Trello's visual project management capabilities.
integrations.discordbot: Send messages, manage servers, and integrate team communication through Discord's platform.
integrations.zoom: Schedule meetings, manage participants, and integrate video conferencing into your workflow.
integrations.calendar: Create events, manage schedules, and synchronize calendar activities with your development process.
integrations.drive: Upload, download, and manage files with Google Drive integration for seamless document sharing.
integrations.sheets: Create, update, and manage Google Sheets with data synchronization and automated spreadsheet workflows.
integrations.asana: Create tasks, manage projects, and track progress with Asana's comprehensive project management features.
integrations.hubspot: Manage contacts, deals, and customer relationships with HubSpot's CRM integration.
integrations.salesforce: Access and manage customer data, leads, and opportunities through Salesforce CRM integration.
integrations.shopify: Manage products, orders, and customer data with Shopify e-commerce platform integration.
integrations.stripe: Process payments, manage subscriptions, and handle financial transactions through Stripe integration.
integrations.dropbox: Upload, download, and manage files with Dropbox cloud storage integration.
integrations.onedrive: Access and manage files through Microsoft OneDrive cloud storage integration.
integrations.teams: Send messages, manage channels, and integrate team communication through Microsoft Teams.
integrations.outlook: Send, receive, and manage emails with Microsoft Outlook integration for comprehensive email management.
integrations.datadog: Manage Datadog from Kodus—monitors, metrics/logs/traces, incidents & SLOs, synthetics, and dashboards.
integrations.clickup: Create tasks, manage projects, and track progress with ClickUp's comprehensive project management features.
integrations.figma: Pull Figma resources into Kodus—files, components, styles, variables, comments—and export tokens to Tailwind.
integrations.posthog: Create and control PostHog feature flags from Kodus: per-user overrides, flag details, frontend status, and project/early-access lists.

integrations.context7-default: Context7 MCP pulls up-to-date, version-specific documentation and code examples straight from the source — and places them directly into your prompt.
integrations.kodus-docs-default: Kodus Docs MCP exposes the official Kodus documentation as MCP tools, allowing Kodus to respond with official snippets, setup guides, and examples always up to date.
integrations.kodus-github-issues-default: Read github issues using your existing kodus integration in your selected repositories.
integrations.sentry-default: Sentry MCP allows agents to access project and team info, retrieve and update issues and events, and create releases—bringing error tracking and release management into your code reviews.
integrations.exa-default: Exa Search MCP allows agents to search for information in multiple codebases and retrieve relevant results.
integrations.kodus-osv-default: Kodus OSV MCP allows agents to query for known package vulnerabilities in your codebase.
integrations.linear-default: Create and manage Linear issues: create, update, and label tasks, add comments, fetch cycles, projects, and states, and run queries—keeping code reviews and your roadmap perfectly in sync.
integrations.atlassian-rovo-default: Atlassian Rovo MCP enables agents to search across your Atlassian ecosystem (Jira, Confluence) and retrieve relevant knowledge and context.
